title: Home electricity data generator (HEDGE): An open-access tool for electric vehicle and PV profiles
author: Charbonnier, Morstyn, et al.

steps.title: Import data sourcesCustomer-led network revolution (CLNR)...
steps.instruction: Import data sourcesCustomer-led network revolution (CLNR) dataset TC1aCLNR dataset TC5UK National Travel Survey

steps.title: Data selection and filteringOnly residential data...
steps.instruction: Data selection and filteringOnly residential data is used, and for valid date ranges.Only residential car journeys are selected.

steps.title: Conversion to relevant daily profilesConvert to...
steps.instruction: Conversion to relevant daily profilesConvert to resolution specified (which has to be greater than or equal to 1 min)Get resolution specified (greater than or equal to 30 mins)Convert list of trips to the distance travelled per time interval at the resolution specified. Infer the type of trip (motorway, urban, rural) from the location and distance. Then convert the distance travelled to electricity consumption based on the trip type. Infer at-home availability of the car based on trip times, origins and destinations.

steps.title: Missing data interpolationLinearly fill in single...
steps.instruction: Missing data interpolationLinearly fill in single missing time steps or discard the day of data.

steps.title: NormalisationNormalise daily profiles by the sum...
steps.instruction: NormalisationNormalise daily profiles by the sum of the electricity consumption/generation over one day. Record the scaling factors.

steps.title: Behaviour groupingNo clustering – group by month
steps.instruction: Behaviour groupingNo clustering – group by month.For each day type (weekday and weekend day), obtain 4 clusters using K-means.For each day type (weekday and weekend day), obtain 3 clusters using K-means, as well as one for no-travel days.

steps.title: Profile generationTrain generative adversarial networks (GANs)...
steps.instruction: Profile generationTrain generative adversarial networks (GANs) to generate realistic profiles for each behaviour group.

steps.title: Scaling factor transition characterisationUsing 50 discrete...
steps.instruction: Scaling factor transition characterisationUsing 50 discrete time intervals for each day type transition, obtain the discrete transition probabilities between subsequent days.

steps.title: Behaviour cluster transition characterisationNo clustering
steps.instruction: Behaviour cluster transition characterisationNo clustering.Compute the transition probabilities for each cluster type and day type transition based on the real datasets.
